prompt: I fixed a bug in the RagModal where the semantic score wasn't showing correctly. Existing e2e tests exist in front/e2e/. Run the rag-modal tests and tell me if we're good to commit.
assertions: Checks whether front/e2e/ and playwright.config.ts already exist before trying to set up
Runs the rag-modal tests (not all tests, just the relevant ones)
Gives a clear verdict: ready to commit or needs a fix first
Does NOT re-install Playwright if it's already configured
